anti_capture_rules: Appeal, refusal, fork, and revocation rights cannot be removed by ordinary vote.

authority_lease.scope: Template authority for governance seed drafting only.

build_plan.production_grade_definition: A governance seed is production-grade only when roles, refusal rights, appeals, revocation, and fork paths are explicit.

canon_conditions: The governance seed reduces capture risk and makes correction cheaper.
compost_conditions: The governance seed creates unchallengeable authority or founder-only veto.

strongest_objections: The governance seed may become process theater or hidden centralization.

failure_conditions: Authority has no expiry, revoker, appeal, or fork path.
claim.scope: A governance pattern for SAB-compatible institutions and agent systems.
success_conditions: Governance decisions are witnessed, reversible where possible, appealable, and forkable.
claim.text: This governance seed can coordinate authority without letting authority become permanent.

commons_return.minimum_return: Governance lessons, failures, and policy diffs remain queryable for future institutions.

title: Governance Seed Template
